name: Lecrae
title: Rapper & Author
bio: American Christian hip-hop artist, songwriter, and record producer. His 2014 album 'Anomaly' debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200. Grammy Award winner and founder of Reach Records.
faith: Lecrae converted to Christianity as a teenager and has made his faith central to his music and identity. He has been transparent about his struggles and growth as a Christian. His memoir 'Unashamed' details his journey from a troubled youth to faith in Christ.

videos.title: I Was Done Believing in GOD, Until He Said THIS To Me (Testimony)
